name: Brian's Apple Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch jelly-roll pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In another large bowl, whisk together the oil and eggs until blended and smooth. Add sugar and vanilla; whisk to combine.
5. Stir in the flour mixture until just combined.
6. Gently stir in the chopped apples, nuts, and raisins (if using).
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into squares.
